parsed.answer: I cannot answer this question with confidence. My training data has a cutoff of February 2025, before January 2026. While January 2026 is now in the past, I don't have access to Antarctic meteorological databases or archived weather records from Vostok Station. This data would require specialized climate monitoring sources that I cannot access without permissions I haven't been granted. Vostok temperature records are typically archived in databases maintained by Antarctic research programs or meteorological services, not widely reported sources.
